productDisplayName: Nike Men The Overplay VII Black Sports Shoes
description: Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Overplay VII shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe.UpperSynthetic upper with mesh tongue and overlays at the anklePerforations on the forefoot area for enhanced breathable comfortSynthetic nike swoosh on both sides of the mid-footPadded synthetic tongue and collar that has fabric lining for snug comfortLace up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum traction and optimal performanceTPU shank in the mid-foot for enhanced stability and ergonomic comfort to the inner arch Warranty: 6 months from date of purchase Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
